announcement.endBeforeStart: End date must be on or after the start date.

assignment.alreadyTerminal: This assignment is already completed or cancelled and can't be changed.
assignment.cannotCancel: You don't have permission to cancel this.
assignment.cannotChangeStatus: You don't have permission to change this status.
assignment.cannotComment: You can't comment on this assignment.
assignment.cannotComplete: You don't have permission to complete this.
assignment.cannotCompleteNonDelivered: Only delivered assignments can be completed.
assignment.cannotDelete: You don't have permission to delete this assignment.
assignment.cannotDeleteOrStatus: You don't have permission to delete this assignment, or its status makes it undeletable.
assignment.cannotEdit: You don't have permission to edit this assignment.
assignment.cannotEditInline: You don't have permission to edit this.
assignment.cannotMarkDelivered: You don't have permission to mark this delivered.
assignment.cannotReassignTerminal: This assignment is completed or cancelled and can't be reassigned.
assignment.cannotStart: You don't have permission to start this.
assignment.cannotStartTerminal: Can't start an assignment that isn't ready to begin.
assignment.commissionPaidLocksReopen: Commission for this quarter was already marked paid. Mark the quarter unpaid first, then reopen this assignment.
assignment.completedReverseRequiresAdmin: This assignment is already completed — reversing requires admin help.
assignment.fileEditsClosed: This assignment is completed or cancelled — file edits are closed.
assignment.fileMissing: The file you're trying to access is no longer available.
assignment.freelancerCannotCreate: Freelancers can't create assignments. Ask the realtor who hired you.
assignment.freelancerNotEligible: That user isn't an active freelancer.
assignment.freelancerOnlyAssign: Only admins and staff can assign a freelancer.
assignment.needsTeamToCreate: You need to own a team before you can create an assignment.
assignment.noLongerEditable: This assignment is completed or cancelled and can no longer be edited.
assignment.noScheduledDate: This assignment has no scheduled date yet.
assignment.referenceCollision: Couldn't reserve a reference number. Try again in a moment.
assignment.roleCannotSetStatus: Your role can't set this status.
assignment.staleEdit: Someone else just edited this assignment. Reload to see their changes.
assignment.staleReassign: Someone else just reassigned this freelancer. Reload to see who's on it.
assignment.staleSnapshot: Someone else just updated this assignment. Reload and try again.
assignment.statusChangedAway: Status changed while you were away. Reload and try again.
assignment.statusChangedEditing: Status changed while you were editing. Reload and try again.
assignment.tooManyRealtorFiles: Too many files at a time.
assignment.uploadsClosed: This assignment is completed or cancelled — uploads are closed.
assignment.uploadsClosedDuringUpload: This assignment closed while you were uploading. Reload and try again.

auth.accountInactive: This account is no longer active.
auth.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before signing in.
auth.emailTaken: An account with that email already exists. Try logging in.
auth.emailTakenOnAnotherAccount: That email is already in use on another account.
auth.lastAdminCannotDelete: You are the last admin. Promote another user before deleting your account.
auth.noPasswordSet: Your account has no password set. Use the forgot-password flow to set one.
auth.noPasswordSetForDeletion: Your account has no password set — cannot confirm deletion.
auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
auth.tokenInvalid: This link has expired or already been used.

calendar.addEventFailed: Couldn't add the event to your calendar. Try reconnecting.
calendar.adminStaffOnly: Calendar connection is limited to admin and staff.
calendar.connectFirst: Connect your Google calendar first from Settings → Integrations.

commission.markAdminsOnly: Only admins can mark commissions paid.
commission.nothingToMarkPaid: Nothing to mark paid — this team has no commission this quarter.
commission.undoAdminsOnly: Only admins can undo commission payouts.

contact.rateLimited: Too many submissions from this network. Try again later.
contact.updateAdminsOnly: Only admins can update contact submissions.

file.agencyOnlySupporting: Only the assignment's agency can upload supporting files.
file.cannotDeleteOthers: You can only delete files you uploaded.
file.cannotViewAssignmentFiles: You don't have permission to see this assignment's files.
file.freelancerOnlyDeliverables: Only the assigned freelancer can upload deliverables.
file.keysMismatch: Upload keys don't match this assignment.
file.sizeMismatch: An upload doesn't match the expected size.
file.stateChanged: File state changed while you were away. Reload and try again.
file.tooLarge: File is larger than the allowed limit.
file.tooMany: Too many files at a time.
file.tooManyFinalize: Too many files to finalize at a time.
file.typeMismatch: An upload doesn't match its declared file type.
file.uploadIncomplete: An upload didn't finish. Try again.

generic.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
generic.rateLimitedAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
generic.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

invite.adminOnlyForAdminStaff: Only admins can invite admin or staff users.
invite.alreadyPending: There's already a pending invite for this email. Revoke it first.
invite.alreadyUsed: This invite has already been used.
invite.cannotInvite: You don't have permission to invite users.
invite.cannotResend: You don't have permission to resend this invite.
invite.cannotRevoke: You don't have permission to revoke this invite.
invite.claimedOrInvalid: This invite has already been used or is no longer valid.
invite.emailMismatch: This invite was sent to a different email address.
invite.existingUserNeedsTeam: This email already has an account. Pick a team to add them to.
invite.existingUserSignIn: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in.
invite.expiredAskAgain: This invite has expired. Ask to be re-invited.
invite.freelancerCannotJoinTeam: This email belongs to a freelancer — freelancers work platform-wide and can't be added to teams.
invite.mustAssignToYourTeam: You must assign the invitee to your team.
invite.onlyTeamsYouOwn: You can only invite to teams you own.
invite.ownerExists: This team already has an owner. Invite as a member, or transfer ownership first.
invite.pickTeamFirst: Pick a team before setting a team role.
invite.pickTeamRole: Pick a team role (Member or Owner).
invite.resendRateLimited: Rate limited — too many resends in the last hour. Try again later.

odoo.productNameTooLong: Product name is too long (max 200 chars).

permission.forbidden: You don't have permission to do this.
permission.staffOnly: Only admins and staff can do this.

profile.imageTooLarge: Image must be 2 MB or smaller.

revenueAdjustment.addAdminsOnly: Only admins can add revenue adjustments.
revenueAdjustment.amountNonZero: Amount must be a non-zero number.
revenueAdjustment.removeAdminsOnly: Only admins can remove revenue adjustments.

session.expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
session.notTeamMember: You're not a member of that team.

switcher.alreadySignedIn: You are already signed in as that account.
switcher.disabled: Account switching is disabled in this environment.
switcher.founderOnly: Only the founder may initiate switches in production.
switcher.notAuthorized: Your account is not authorised to switch.
switcher.notSignedIn: You must be signed in to switch accounts.
switcher.targetNotInGroup: Target account is not in the switcher group.

team.alreadyOwner: That user is already the team owner.
team.brandingOwnersOnly: Only admins and team owners can change team branding.
team.cannotCreate: You don't have permission to create teams.
team.cannotDelete: You don't have permission to delete this team.
team.cannotEdit: You don't have permission to edit this team.
team.cannotManageMembers: You don't have permission to manage this team's members.
team.lastOwner: You can't remove the last owner of a team.
team.memberAlreadyExists: That user is already a member of this team.
team.memberNotInTeam: That user is not on this team.
team.overrideAdminsOnly: Only admins can change team price overrides.
team.pricelistAdminsOnly: Only admins can change team pricelist bindings.
team.priceLooksOff: Price looks off — use cents (e.g. 14500 for €145).
team.priceMustBePositive: Price must be greater than 0. Use Reset to clear the override and fall back to the base price.
team.stillHasAssignments: This team still has assignments on record. Delete or reassign those first — historical teams can't be removed while history references them.
team.transferOnlyAdmins: Only admins can transfer team ownership.
team.transferOwnerFirst: Transfer ownership to another member before removing the current owner.
team.transferTargetIneligible: Team ownership can only be transferred to a realtor or admin. Change their platform role first.
team.transferTargetMissing: That user is no longer a member of this team. Refresh the page and try again.

user.cannotDelete: You don't have permission to delete this user.
user.cannotEdit: You don't have permission to edit this user.
user.deleteAdminsOnly: Only admins can delete other users.
user.editAdminsOnly: Only admins can edit other users.
user.lastAdminDelete: Can't delete the last admin. Promote another user to admin first.
user.lastAdminDemote: Can't demote the last admin. Promote another user to admin first.
user.resetPasswordAdminsOnly: Only admins can reset another user's password.
user.selfDeleteNotHere: Use the self-service delete flow in Settings to remove your own account.
user.stillInTeams: Remove this user from all teams before deleting. They still belong to one or more teams.

validation.checkForm: Check the form and try again.
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.

verification.linkExpired: This verification link has expired. Request a new one from your settings.
verification.linkStaleEmail: This link was sent for a previous email. Request a new verification link from your settings.
verification.linkUsed: This verification link has already been used.
verification.sendFailed: Couldn't send the verification email right now. Try again in a minute.
